missing-camera-permissions.title: Allow access to your camera
missing-camera-permissions.description: This lets you take photos of your document, and we can use them to properly verify your ID.
missing-camera-permissions.action-required: Open settings to update camera permissions.

check-lighting.title: Check your lighting
check-lighting.description: It can't be too bright or too dark.

device-steady.title: Hold your device steady
device-steady.description: Make sure you're holding your device steady to get a clear photo without any blur or glare.

whole-document.title: Get the whole document in the photo
whole-document.description: We recommend that you place your document on a flat surface.

country-and-type-selection.title: Scan or upload your ID
country-and-type-selection.subtitle: We need some more information about your identity.
